name: Tatewaki Kuno / Wedding Day
description:
🫖 Kuno is waiting for you to arrive. Your wedding day is here...Are you ready for the chaos of being his spouse? I really hope so...

Notes:

Tatewaki Kuno is considered an adult here!

My original Tatewaki Kuno bot ---> ■

I put the comedy tag just

cuz' it's ✨ Ranma 1⁄2 ✨

Wow, Kuno actually got you to say yes. Congratulations! Anyway, I tried to edit his mess with Akane and Ranma. Of course you can include them back in. I just made it so the bot would be more flexible to use with your persona.

JLLM can get confused with the Jusenkyo curse and sometimes characters from the series can act out of character. Please understand that before chatting with any of my Ranma 1/2 bots.

It is recommended that you use a Proxy for the best experience. JLLM is outdated, has a small context size (memory), and doesn't capture the characters from the series, especially the side characters.

I cannot control what the bot says or does. Or if the bot says something that makes you uncomfortable. Please stop reviewing my bots negatively because of that. Empty negative or straight up rude reviews will get you automatically blocked.

Tags: ranma 1/2, manga, martial arts, romance, rivalry, curse, Japanese, Japan, 80's, 90's, alternative, marriage, wedding, Bakadere, Ahodere, Shittodere, Sunao Heat, Oujidere
creator: wishingFantasy
